details: The scheme "Sudakshya for Girls Child Scholarship" has been implemented by the Skill Development & Technical Education Department, Government of Odisha. Many girl students left their academics after 10th due to various reasons. To encourage girls towards technical education, a new initiative has been started by the Odisha government.

Sudakshya for Girls Child Scholarship is specially designed for the General/ ST/ SC/ OBC/ SEBC/ EBC category girl child of Odisha state. Under this scholarship scheme, the government is going to provide financial help to the students. Girl students who win the award will get cash benefits. The scholarship is only for girls who are pursuing ITI courses in any trade.
benefits: Reimbursement of Admission and Hostel Fee.
Maintenance Allowances will be given of ₹1,500/- per month for Hostellers and ₹500/- for Day Scholars.
Maintenance Allowances ₹1,000/- per month for Apprenticeship Training after ITI inside the state and ₹1,500/- per month for outside the state.
One Month Maintenance Allowances of ₹5,000/- after completion of 6 months on Jobs outside the State.
Benefits will be directly transferred to the bank account of the student.
Maintenance Allowances shall be released on a half-yearly basis.
ST, SC, OBC, Minority, Children of BOC Workers, PwD, MCP, Merit, and other stipend/scholarship holders will get differential amounts only.
eligibility: The applicant must be a resident of Odisha state.
The applicant must be a girl child.
The applicant must belong to the General/ST/SC/OBC/SEBC/EBC category.
The applicant must be pursuing I.T.I. / I.T.C., Polytechnic/ Diploma courses.

online: To apply for the scholarship students, students have to go to the
Select the registration option that is available at the top of the page.
Read the details, tick the checkbox, and choose I Agree on the option.
Further read, tick the checkbox, and select the proceed button.
Enter the Aadhaar number and select Verify.
Enter the OTP and mention further details.
Select the register option and log in with the portal.
Go to the apply button and select the scholarship scheme.
Fill out the application form open on the screen.
Mention all the significant details and upload the documents.
Review the application and submit it.
Take a printout at last for further use.

documents_required: Income Certificate of the Parent/ guardian
Copy of passbook of Bank account with the account number and IFSC code of the bank branch
Self Declaration Certificate of the student
College Id Card of the Student
The Marksheet of the last exam passed

faqs.question: Who is the eligible for SUDAKSHYA Scholarship?
faqs.answer: 1. The applicant should be a citizen of Odisha state. 2. Applicant must belong to the General/ST/SC/OBC/SEBC/EBC category. 3. Applicant should be pursuing ITI or ITC

faqs.question: What are the benefits?
faqs.answer: 1. Reimbursement of Admission and Hostel Fee 2. Maintenance Allowances will be given of ₹1,500/- per month for Hosteller and ₹500/- for Day Scholar. 3. Reimbursablecost of uniform ₹3,000/-. 4. Benefits will directly transfer to the bank account of the student 5. Maintenance Allowances shall be released on a half-yearly basis. 6. ST, SC, OBC, Minority, Children of BOC Workers, PwD, MCP, Merit and such other stipend/scholarship holders will get differential amounts only. 7. Maintenance Allowances ₹1,000/- per month for Apprenticeship Training after ITIinside the state and ₹1,500/- per month for outside the state 8. 1 Month Maintenance Allowances of ₹5,000/- after completion of 6 months on Jobsoutside the State

faqs.question: Which documents are required while apply the application?
faqs.answer: 1. Aadhaar Card of the student 2. College Id Card of the Student 3. Copy of the passbook of the Bank account with the account number and IFSC code of the bank branch Income Certificate of the Parent/ guardian 4. The Marksheet of the last exam passed 5. Passport-size Photograph of a student 6. Self-Declaration Certificate of the student

faqs.question: What is the application procedure?
faqs.answer: Visit the official website and follow the further steps URL: https://scholarship.odisha.gov.in/website/home

faqs.question: How to check the status of the application?
faqs.answer: 1. To check the status, students have to go to the official website of the state scholarship portal. 2. The homepage of the website will open on the screen. 3. Now from the homepage, you have to click on the know your status option. 4. A new page will open where you have to select the search type as application status or complaint status. 5. Select according to your search requirement and enter further details. 6. Now click on the search option. 7. The application details will open on the screen.
